name: mayekama
description: MayekAma Website Version 20: flat project packaging, active story artwork, complete Tapta reader layout, desktop/mobile footer navigation, and visible version marker.

scripts.lint: echo "Lint placeholder: add ESLint in Build 2"
scripts.build:all: npm run check && npm run build && npm run validate:pack && npm run test:engine

scripts.release:check: npm run check && npm run validate:pack && npm run test:engine && npm run android:status && node scripts/release-report.mjs
